mapper.sql: select a.tableproject, a.lastDate, a.TABLETYPE, a.tableNameEN, a.tableNameZH, a.LIFECYCLE, a.TABLEALLCOUNT, a.TABLESIZE, a.tableusecount, a.tableUseCountOfDay, a.tableUseCountOfWeek, a.tableUseCountOfMonth from ( select s.tableproject, date_format(s.PARTITIONDATE, '%Y%m%d') as lastDate, s.TABLETYPE, s.tableproject || '.' || s.TABLENAME as tableNameEN, s.TABLECOMMENT as tableNameZH, s.LIFECYCLE, s.TABLEALLCOUNT, s.TABLESIZE, u.tableusecount, u.tableUseCountOfDay, u.tableUseCountOfWeek, u.tableUseCountOfMonth from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL s left join ( select t0.tablename, t0.project, t0.tableUseCount, t3.tableUseCountOfMonth, t2.tableUseCountOfWeek, t1.tableUseCountOfDay from ( select sum(table_Use_Count) as tableUseCount, tablename, project from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT group by tablename, project ) t0 left join ( select sum(table_Use_Count) as tableUseCountOfMonth, tablename, project from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT where dt between date_format(date_sub(now(), interval 31 day), '%Y-%m-%d') and date_format(date_sub(now(), interval 1 day), '%Y-%m-%d') group by tablename, project ) t3 on (t0.tablename = t3.tablename and t0.project = t3.project) left join ( select sum(table_Use_Count) as tableUseCountOfWeek, tablename, project from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT where dt between date_format(date_sub(now(), interval 7 day), '%Y-%m-%d') and date_format(date_sub(now(), interval 1 day), '%Y-%m-%d') group by tablename, project ) t2 on (t0.tablename = t2.tablename and t0.project = t2.project) left join ( select sum(table_Use_Count) as tableUseCountOfDay, tablename, project from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT where dt = date_format(date_sub(now(), interval 1 day), '%Y-%m-%d') group by tablename, project ) t1 on (t0.tablename = t1.tablename and t0.project = t1.project) ) u on (upper(u.tablename) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = upper(s.tablename) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci and upper(s.tableproject) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = upper(u.project) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci) ) a where lastDate = date_format(date_sub(now(), interval 1 day), '%Y%m%d')
mapper.select:
select sum(table_use_count) from
select sum(table_use_count) as table_use_count from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT where upper(tablename) = upper(#{key,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and project = #{map[${key}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select b.partitiondate, a.tablename as tableNameEN, a.tabletype, a.TABLECREATEDTIME, a.TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME, a.PARTITIONCOUNT, a.TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME, a.tableProject, a.tableSize from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL a right join ( select a.tablename, max(a.partitiondate) as partitiondate from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL a group by a.tablename ) b on a.tablename = b.tablename and a.partitiondate = b.partitiondate
